title: Neurogramma pedata
uses: Neurogramma pedata, also known as the fan-leaved neurogramma, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal uses include treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves are said to have antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and infections. In addition, Neurogramma pedata is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Neurogramma pedata for medicinal purposes.
